objective.title: Stand up a validated client-facing web app
objective.problem: The client needs a modern web application stood up quickly with deployment, validation, billing, and handoff.
objective.targetUser: Small business operator launching a new service
objective.desiredOutcome: A live validated deployment with billing connected and client handoff ready.

synthesis.summary: Starling synthesized the client's requested service into a managed build path suitable for connected execution.
assumptions: The client approves a Next.js and Supabase implementation.
The client either has Stripe already or wants it connected during setup.

execution.rationale: All required capabilities are available through connected platforms.
